summary: Settings Dialog (Asetukset) feature testing PASSED. All 10 requested features verified working correctly via UI testing.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: SettingsDialog.js is well-structured with clear separation of concerns (ToolPresetsTab, MaksueraPresetsTab components)
localStorage keys are properly defined as constants (STORAGE_KEY_PRESETS, STORAGE_KEY_MAKSUERAPRESETS)
Default presets are properly structured with getDefaultPresets() and getDefaultMaksueraPresets() functions
seed_data_creation: Default presets stored in localStorage (rakenna_custom_presets, rakenna_maksuerapresets)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Dialog feature fully implemented and verified. Presets are stored in localStorage. Default presets include YSE-6 and YSE-8 for Maksuerätaulukko.

tests_executed.details: Button with data-testid='settings-button' visible in toolbar with Settings icon and 'Asetukset' label
Tabs found: 'Mittaus presetit' (wrench icon) and 'Maksuerätaulukko' (calculator icon)

tests_executed.test: 3. Tool selector dropdown in Mittaus presetit tab
tests_executed.details: Tool dropdown shows 5 options: Viiva (jm), Seinä (jm → m²), Suorakulmio (m²), Monikulmio (m²), Kappalemäärä (kpl)
Group dropdown shows groups based on selected tool. For 'Suorakulmio': Katto, Lattia, Alakatto rakennus
Clicking preset chevron expands to show: Nimi (name), Hinta (€) (price), Yksikkö (unit dropdown), Rakennus-tyyppi (construction type dropdown)

tests_executed.test: 6. Lisää preset button adds new preset
tests_executed.details: 'Lisää preset' button adds new preset with default name 'Uusi preset' and 0 €/unit price

tests_executed.test: 7. Maksuerätaulukko tab shows YSE-6 and YSE-8
tests_executed.details: Default presets displayed: YSE-6 (balanced) with 6 rows, YSE-8 (detailed) with 8 rows, both marked as (oletus)

tests_executed.test: 8. New maksuerä preset can be added
tests_executed.details: Input field 'Uuden presetin nimi...' with '+ Lisää' button allows adding custom payment schedule presets
Save button triggers toast 'Asetukset tallennettu' and updates localStorage keys
Reset button shows confirm dialog, then restores default presets and shows toast 'Oletusasetukset palautettu'

mittaus_presetit_tab.tool_selector: Dropdown with 5 tool types (line, wall, rectangle, polygon, count)
mittaus_presetit_tab.group_selector: Dropdown showing groups for selected tool
mittaus_presetit_tab.preset_items: Expandable cards with edit fields (name, price, unit, construction type)
mittaus_presetit_tab.add_preset: Button adds new preset to current group

maksuera_tab.add_preset_input: Input field with '+ Lisää' button for custom presets
maksuera_tab.editing: Custom presets can be edited, default presets are read-only

code_quality.integration: Properly integrated in App.js with settingsDialogOpen state and onPresetsChange callback
